name: R5UsageContextElementMapToR4
title: Cross-version mapping for FHIR R5 UsageContext to FHIR R4 UsageContext
description: This ConceptMap represents cross-version mappings for elements from a FHIR R5 UsageContext to FHIR R4.

target.comment: Element `UsageContext.code` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `UsageContext.code` as `Equivalent`.
Element `UsageContext.code` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `UsageContext.code` as `Equivalent`.

Element `UsageContext.value[x]` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `UsageContext.value[x]` as `Equivalent`.
The target context `UsageContext.value[x]` is a choice-type element and cannot directly hold extensions. The context is moved up to parent element `UsageContext`.

Element `UsageContext.value[x]` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `UsageContext.value[x]` as `Equivalent`.
The target context `UsageContext.value[x]` is a choice-type element and cannot directly hold extensions. The context is moved up to parent element `UsageContext`.
